standards_checked_summary.standard_1_no_inline_code: PASS — agents/changelog-analyst.md code blocks are prescriptive LLM instructions (agent spec format), not standalone executable scripts. This is the established project convention for agent files; prior style reports do not flag this pattern.
standards_checked_summary.standard_2_no_hardcoded_values: PASS — hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh uses ${VAR:-default} parameterization throughout (CLAUDE_HOME, CLAUDE_TMPDIR, CLAUDE_PYTHON_BIN, DAEMON_RESTART_GRANT_DIR, etc.). No hardcoded absolute paths or credentials in changed files.
standards_checked_summary.standard_3_use_source_venv: PASS — python3 references in pretool-bash-safety.sh are: (a) fallback in PYTHON_BIN variable assignment (venv path checked first at line 10); (b) pattern strings in regex detection logic; (c) comments. No bare python3 invocations without venv. python3 references in test files are test payload strings, not actual invocations.
standards_checked_summary.standard_4_integer_step_numbering: PASS — no decimal step numbering found in any changed .md file.
standards_checked_summary.standard_5_meaningful_naming: PASS — no files matching forbidden patterns (enhance-*, fast-*, optimize-*, *-v2.*, improved-*, better-*, new-*) with hyphen separator in changed files. Test files with _v2 suffix (underscore) are outside the '*-v2.*' hyphen-delimited pattern; they also have descriptive functional names (e.g., 'ansic_bypass_family_v2', 'glob_entry_gate_matrix_v2').
standards_checked_summary.standard_6_english_only: PASS for new changes — all Chinese text found is pre-existing and outside this cycle's diff ranges. Unconditional scan completed for all agents/*.md and commands/*.md directories.
standards_checked_summary.standard_7_merge_similar_scripts: PASS — no duplicate or closely overlapping scripts introduced by this cycle. Test files represent versioned test suite iterations for distinct acceptance criteria (AC-03 through AC-08), not overlapping functionality.
standards_checked_summary.standard_8_concise_documentation: PASS — agents/changelog-analyst.md is a dense technical specification with no marketing language, no repetitive examples, and no story-style text. Content is functional workflow specification.
standards_checked_summary.standard_9_parameterized_scripts: PASS — pretool-bash-safety.sh parameterizes all configurable values via ${VAR:-default} pattern. No hardcoded thresholds or environment-specific values without parameter fallback.
standards_checked_summary.standard_10_dangling_references: PASS — scripts/resolve-dev-report.py exists; hooks/lib/allowlist.py exists; hooks/lib/bash_context_strip.py exists. No dangling script references found in changed files.
standards_checked_summary.standard_11_merge_conflicts: PASS — no unresolved merge conflict markers in any of the 18 changed files.
